description:
A developer applied a suite of production Kubernetes manifests to the local development cluster, but the workloads are stuck in Pending or failing states due to production-specific constraints. Diagnose and remediate the failures in the 'dev-environment' namespace so all workloads are running correctly and are compatible with the local single-node development environment. 

Requirements:
1. 'web-app' Deployment: All 3 replicas must be running.
2. 'db-backend' StatefulSet: The pod must be running and its PVC bound to a locally available storage class.
3. 'data-processor' Deployment: The pod must be running.
4. 'web-ingress' Ingress: The resource must successfully acquire an IP address from the local ingress controller.

The original production manifests are available at /home/ga/Desktop/prod_manifests.yaml for reference. Access the environment via the Rancher UI (https://localhost, admin / Admin12345678!) or the terminal.
